name: Debian 13 Graphical KVM
postCreateCommand: apt-get update && apt-get install -y x11vnc xvfb fluxbox novnc qemu-system-x86 qemu-utils libvirt-clients && (Xvfb :1 -screen 0 1280x1024x24 &) && export DISPLAY=:1 && (fluxbox &) && (x11vnc -display :1 -forever -bg -nopw -rfbport 5900 &) && (/usr/share/novnc/utils/novnc_proxy --vnc localhost:5900 --listen 6080 &)
